nasb.text: She rises also while it is still night And gives food to her household And portions to her maidens.

esv.text: She rises while it is yet night and provides food for her household and portions for her maidens.

cnv.text: 天還未亮，她就起來， 把食物分給家人， 把當作的工分派眾婢女。

ccb.text: 天未亮她就起床， 为全家预备食物， 分派女仆做家事。

csbs.text: 天还黑的时候，她就起来， 把粮食分给家人， 把任务分给使女们。
